characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a white, segmented face and body, exposing mechanical joints at the neck and shoulders. It has dark, hollow-looking eyes.
Young Indian man, medium build, brown complexion, short dark hair, light beard and mustache.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I sleeping.
Character A says: 'I am sleeping' बोलना चाहिए। थोड़ा formal तरीके से 'I am getting some sleep' भी बोल सकते हो। [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say 'I am getting some sleep' in a slightly formal way.]
Character B says: अरे हाँ, पर मैं अच्छी English कैसे सीखूँ? [Oh yes, but how do I learn good English?]
Character A says: मेरे साथ रोज़ 15 minutes practice करो। हम real-world situations में बात करेंगे, बिना किसी डर के। [Practice with me for 15 minutes daily. We will talk in real-world situations, without any fear.]
Character B says: क्या ये बहुत महँगा है? [Is it very expensive?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं, ये बहुत affordable है! लाखों लोग Supernova के साथ confidence से English बोलना सीख रहे हैं। [Not at all, it's very affordable! Lakhs of people are learning to speak English with confidence with Supernova.]
Character B says: Super! मैं कैसे join करूँ? [Super! How do I join?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, everyday English mistake.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a helpful, non-judgmental guide.
- Highlights core Supernova features (daily 15-min practice, real-world situations) while removing unrealistic guarantees.
- Addresses price objections gently by emphasizing affordability and social proof.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या कर रहे हो? (What are you doing?) I am sleeping थोड़ा formal (a little formal) I am getting some sleep अच्छी English कैसे सीखूँ? (How to learn good English?) रोज़ 15 minutes practice (Daily 15 minutes practice) Real-world situations बहुत affordable (Very affordable) लाखों लोग (Lakhs of people) Supernova कैसे join करूँ? (How to join?)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही Supernova app download करो, [Download the Supernova app today,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the problem/solution dialogue to the direct call-to-action.
- Shows the app store interface to guide the user on the next step.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova AI English Speaking App Supernova AI In-app purchases Install Cancel Open What's new Last updated Rate this app App support

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और confidence के साथ English बोलना शुरू करो। [and start speaking English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Brings the viewer back to the personal connection with the AI tutor.
- Delivers the final emotional payoff: speaking with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Confidence के साथ (With confidence) English बोलना शुरू करो (Start speaking English)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अभी 'Install' पर click करें और Supernova app download करें। [Click on 'Install' now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Final, clear call-to-action.
- Reinforces the brand name and the specific action required (Install).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova English speaking app Install Now
